_about: Classification of upstream vm/vm_test.go tests. These assert Go-internal VM behavior (opcode-level construction, reflect method calls, MemStats budget). Eval-expressible behavior is covered by the expr/builtin corpora; Go-internal structural tests are NOT_APPLICABLE with reason.

tests.name: TestRun_NilProgram
tests.note: Run(null) throws — covered by unit (Run nil).

tests.name: TestRun_ReuseVM
tests.note: Compile-once/Run-many — covered by unit core.test 'Compile then Run reuses program'.

tests.name: TestRun_ReuseVM_for_different_variables
tests.note: Variable slot reuse — behavior covered by reuse + let tests.

tests.name: TestRun_Cast
tests.note: AsInt/AsInt64/AsFloat64/AsBool casts — covered by expr corpus AsKind paths + numeric.

tests.name: TestRun_Helpers
tests.note: Equal/Less/Add/etc arithmetic helpers — covered by numeric + expr corpora.

tests.name: TestRun_MethodWithError
tests.reason: Go method returning (T, error); JS funcs throw instead of returning error tuple (FORCED_DIVERGENCE A4).

tests.name: TestRun_FastMethods
tests.reason: Go reflect fast-method dispatch (func(...any) any signature on a struct); no JS reflect analog.

tests.name: TestRun_InnerMethodWithError
tests.reason: Go method (T, error) on nested struct; error-tuple convention (A4).

tests.name: TestRun_InnerMethodWithError_NilSafe
tests.reason: Go typed-nil pointer + method error tuple; no JS analog.

tests.name: TestRun_TaggedFieldName
tests.reason: Go struct `expr` tag field renaming via reflect; JS env objects use plain keys (FORCED_DIVERGENCE A2).

tests.name: TestRun_OpInvalid
tests.note: OpInvalid throws 'invalid opcode' — same in vm.ts.

tests.name: TestVM_OpcodeOperations
tests.reason: Hand-builds Program bytecode and asserts VM internal stack; TS VM has documented opcode-representation divergences (e.g. OpInt pushes bigint).

tests.name: TestVM_GroupAndSortOperations
tests.note: groupBy/sortBy result behavior — covered by expr corpus groupBy/sortBy.

tests.name: TestVM_SortBy_NonStringOrder
tests.note: sortBy order arg must be string — vm.ts OpCreate throws same message.

tests.name: TestVM_ProfileOperations
tests.reason: Profiling spans (OpProfileStart/End) are no-ops in TS (DESIGN_DECISION B4).

tests.name: TestVM_IndexOperations
tests.reason: Hand-built bytecode asserting scope index opcodes; Go-internal.

tests.name: TestVM_DirectCallOpcodes
tests.reason: Hand-built OpCall0..3 with typed func tables; TS uses generic calls (DESIGN_DECISION B2).

tests.name: TestVM_CallN
tests.note: Variadic call behavior — covered by expr corpus Variadic(...).

tests.name: TestVM_DirectBasicOpcodes
tests.reason: Hand-built bytecode asserting raw opcode results; Go-internal representation.

tests.name: TestVM_MemoryBudget
tests.note: Memory budget exceeded throws — vm.ts memGrow enforces MemoryBudget identically.

tests.name: TestVM_Limits
tests.note: Range/array allocation limits — vm.ts memGrow on OpRange/OpArray.

tests.name: TestVM_OpJump_NegativeOffset
tests.note: Negative jump offset throws — vm.ts runOp2 guards each jump.

tests.name: TestVM_StackUnderflow
tests.note: pop on empty stack throws 'stack underflow' — vm.ts pop().

tests.name: TestVM_EnvNotCallable
tests.note: Calling nil/non-func throws — vm.ts OpCall guards.

tests.name: TestVM_OpCall_InvalidNumberOfArguments
tests.reason: Go reflect arg-count validation against func signature; TS calls JS funcs without static arity (FORCED_DIVERGENCE A2).

tests.name: TestVM_OpCall_InvalidNumberOfArguments_Variadic
tests.reason: Go reflect variadic arg-count validation; no JS reflect analog.
